About Criatix Infotech

Criatix Infotech is driven to design and develop the best possible IT solutions. We are ambitious problem solvers, coding geeks and exceptionally creative.We are a group of IT experts sharing a common sentiment: We all believe in the transformative power of technology and driven by our commitment to innovation and excellence, we strive to develop IT solutions for businesses that want to become more efficient, agile and profitable.

Criatix Infotech is a one stop shop for all your IT needs.our company boasts of a highly skilled team of IT professionals with varied skill sets and state of art infrastructure and technology. We have on-board highly experienced software architects, designers, developers, and digital marketing experts.

What we do

Here are several ways to contact us

Website Design

We design websites that wow your visitors and turn them into paying customers

Web Development

Turning ideas into reality. We develop bespoke web solutions

SEO and SMM Services

Leverage the power of Google and social media to scale new heights of success

What others say about us

Criatix Infotech team is excellent in all aspects of designing a website…They have met deadlines, and designed the website at a very high standard. I will definitely recommend criatix Infotech team. Thank you Criatix Infotech. : )

Sonia ThaparBusiness Managerhttp://www.alphaukgroup.com/–Alpha UK Group

Great communication, super diligent and detail oriented as well creative – many times they came up with things I didn’t ask but I needed and looked great! I never felt rushed, he made me feel like my task was his #1 priority. A pleasure to work with.

CloudyaDirectorhttp://ameriworld.com/–Ameri World

I engaged with Criatix Infotech to rewrite our website, they were fast, stylish, professional and very very helpful. I really can’t recommend them highly enough, great team and I’d recommend them without hesitation.

AndrewCEOhttp://www.fleetevolution.com/–Fleet Evolution

Criatix Infotech is an incredibly skilled developers team. they goes the extra mile to make sure the customer is fully happy with the result. The communication is flawless, and they are very kind person too. Don’t look any further… Criatix Infotech is who you want to work with! I would work with him again on any day.
